athkar.hints.longPressToTen: Nota: anda boleh tekan lama mana-mana zikir untuk mengira 10

athkar.items.astaghfirullah:
I seek Allah's forgiveness and I turn to Him in repentance.
أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
athkar.items.ayatAlKursi: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ مَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِنْدَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
athkar.items.contentWithAllah:
I am pleased with Allah as a Lord, and Islam as a religion and Muhammad as a Prophet.
رَضِيتُ بِاللَّهِ رَبًّا وَبِالْإِسْلَامِ دِينًا وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ نَبِيًّا
athkar.items.eveningByYourGrace:
O Allah, by Your leave we have reached the evening and by Your leave we have reached the morning, by Your leave we live and die and unto You is our return.
اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا، وَبِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا، وَبِكَ نَحْيَا، وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
athkar.items.eveningFitrah:
We rise upon the fitrah of Islam, and the word of pure faith, and upon the religion of our Prophet Muhammad and the religion of our forefather Ibrahim, who was a Muslim and of true faith and was not of those who associate others with Allah.
أَمْسَيْنَا عَلَى فِطْرَةِ الْإِسْلَامِ، وَعَلَى كَلِمَةِ الْإِخْلَاصِ، وَعَلَى دِينِ نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ، وَعَلَى مِلَّةِ أَبِينَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ، حَنِيفًا مُسْلِمًا وَمَا كَانَ مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ
athkar.items.eveningGratitude:
O Allah, what blessing I or any of Your creation have risen upon, is from You alone, without any partner, so for You is all praise and unto You all thanks.
اللَّهُمَّ مَا أَمْسَى بِي مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ أَوْ بِأَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ فَمِنْكَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ، فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَلَكَ الشُّكْرُ
athkar.items.eveningLordOfWorlds:
We have reached the evening and at this very time all sovereignty belongs to Allah, Lord of the worlds. O Allah, I ask You for the good of this night, its triumphs and its victories, its light and its blessings and its guidance, and I take refuge in You from the evil of this night and the evil that follows it.
أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ هَذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ: فَتْحَهَا، وَنَصْرَهَا، وَنُورَهَا، وَبَرَكَتَهَا، وَهُدَاهَا، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا فِيهَا وَشَرِّ مَا بَعْدَهَا
athkar.items.eveningPraise:
We have reached the evening and at this very time unto Allah, belongs all sovereignty, and all praise is for Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without any partner, to Him belong all sovereignty and praise and He is over all things omnipotent. My Lord, I ask You for the good of this night and the good of what follows it and I take refuge in You from the evil of this night and the evil of what follows it. My Lord, I take refuge in You from laziness and senility. My Lord, I take refuge in You from torment in the Fire and punishment in the grave.
أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ، رَبِّ أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ مَا فِي هَذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ وَخَيْرَ مَا بَعْدَهَا، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا فِي هَذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ وَشَرِّ مَا بَعْدَهَا، رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكَسَلِ وَسُوءِ الْكِبَرِ، رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابٍ فِي النَّارِ وَعَذَابٍ فِي الْقَبْرِ
athkar.items.eveningWitness:
O Allah, verily I have reached the evening and call on You, the bearers of Your throne, Your angels, and all of Your creation to witness that You are Allah, none has the right to be worshipped except You, alone, without any partner and that Muhammad is Your Servant and Messenger.
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَمْسَيْتُ أُشْهِدُكَ، وَأُشْهِدُ حَمَلَةَ عَرْشِكَ، وَمَلَائِكَتَكَ، وَجَمِيعَ خَلْقِكَ، أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ، وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُكَ وَرَسُولُكَ
athkar.items.hasbiAllah:
Allah is Sufficient for me, none has the right to be worshipped except Him, upon Him I rely and He is Lord of the exalted throne.
حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
athkar.items.inTheNameOfAllah:
In the name of Allah with whose name nothing is harmed on earth nor in the heavens and He is The All-Seeing, The All-Knowing.
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
athkar.items.knowerOfUnseen:
O Allah, Knower of the unseen and the seen, Creator of the heavens and the Earth, Lord and Sovereign of all things, I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped except You. I take refuge in You from the evil of my soul and from the evil and shirk of the devil, and from committing wrong against my soul or bringing such upon another Muslim.
اللَّهُمَّ عَالِمَ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ فَاطِرَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ، رَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَمَلِيكَهُ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ نَفْسِي، وَمِنْ شَرِّ الشَّيْطَانِ وَشِرْكِهِ، وَأَنْ أَقْتَرِفَ عَلَى نَفْسِي سُوءًا، أَوْ أَجُرَّهُ إِلَى مُسْلِمٍ
athkar.items.laIlahaIllaAllahFull:
None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without any partner, to Him belong all sovereignty and praise, and He is over all things omnipotent.
لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
athkar.items.morningByYourGrace:
O Allah, by your leave we have reached the morning and by Your leave we have reached the evening, by Your leave we live and die and unto You is our resurrection.
اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا، وَبِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا، وَبِكَ نَحْيَا، وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ النُّشُورُ
athkar.items.morningFitrah:
We rise upon the fitrah of Islam, and the word of pure faith, and upon the religion of our Prophet Muhammad and the religion of our forefather Ibrahim, who was a Muslim and of true faith and was not of those who associate others with Allah.
أَصْبَحْنَا عَلَى فِطْرَةِ الْإِسْلَامِ، وَعَلَى كَلِمَةِ الْإِخْلَاصِ، وَعَلَى دِينِ نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ، وَعَلَى مِلَّةِ أَبِينَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ، حَنِيفًا مُسْلِمًا وَمَا كَانَ مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ
athkar.items.morningGratitude:
O Allah, what blessing I or any of Your creation have risen upon, is from You alone, without any partner, so for You is all praise and unto You all thanks.
اللَّهُمَّ مَا أَصْبَحَ بِي مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ أَوْ بِأَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ فَمِنْكَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ، فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَلَكَ الشُّكْرُ
athkar.items.morningLordOfWorlds:
We have reached the morning and at this very time all sovereignty belongs to Allah, Lord of the worlds. O Allah, I ask You for the good of this day, its triumphs and its victories, its light and its blessings and its guidance, and I take refuge in You from the evil of this day and the evil that follows it.
أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ هَذَا الْيَوْمِ، فَتْحَهُ، وَنَصْرَهُ، وَنُورَهُ وَبَرَكَتَهُ، وَهُدَاهُ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا فِيهِ وَشَرِّ مَا بَعْدَهُ
athkar.items.morningPraise:
We have reached the morning and at this very time unto Allah, belongs all sovereignty, and all praise is for Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without any partner, to Him belong all sovereignty and praise and He is over all things omnipotent. My Lord, I ask You for the good of this day and the good of what follows it and I take refuge in You from the evil of this day and the evil of what follows it. My Lord, I take refuge in You from laziness and senility. My Lord, I take refuge in You from torment in the Fire and punishment in the grave.
أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ، رَبِّ أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ مَا فِي هَذَا الْيَوْمِ وَخَيْرَ مَا بَعْدَهُ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا فِي هَذَا الْيَوْمِ وَشَرِّ مَا بَعْدَهُ، رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكَسَلِ وَسُوءِ الْكِبَرِ، رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابٍ فِي النَّارِ وَعَذَابٍ فِي الْقَبْرِ
athkar.items.morningWitness:
O Allah, verily I have reached the morning and call on You, the bearers of Your throne, Your angels, and all of Your creation to witness that You are Allah, none has the right to be worshipped except You, alone, without any partner and that Muhammad is Your Servant and Messenger.
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَصْبَحْتُ أُشْهِدُكَ، وَأُشْهِدُ حَمَلَةَ عَرْشِكَ، وَمَلَائِكَتَكَ، وَجَمِيعَ خَلْقِكَ، أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ، وَأَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُكَ وَرَسُولُكَ
athkar.items.perfectWordsOfAllah:
I take refuge in Allah's perfect words from the evil He has created.
أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
athkar.items.salawatOnProphet:
O Allah, send prayers and peace upon our Prophet Muhammad.
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ عَلَى نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ
athkar.items.sayyidAlIstighfar:
O Allah, You are my Lord, none has the right to be worshipped except You, You created me and I am Your servant and I abide to Your covenant and promise as best I can, I take refuge in You from the evil of which I have committed. I acknowledge Your favour upon me and I acknowledge my sin, so forgive me, for verily none can forgive sin except You.
اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ، أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ، وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
athkar.items.seekingBeneficialKnowledge:
O Allah, I ask You for knowledge which is beneficial and sustenance which is good, and deeds which are acceptable.
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا، وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا، وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
athkar.items.seekingForgiveness:
O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being in this life and the next. O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being in my religious and worldly affairs, and my family and my wealth. O Allah, veil my weaknesses and set at ease my dismay. O Allah, preserve me from the front and from behind and on my right and on my left and from above, and I take refuge with You lest I be swallowed up by the earth.
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ: فِي دِينِي وَدُنْيَايَ وَأَهْلِي، وَمَالِي، اللَّهُمَّ اسْتُرْ عَوْرَاتِي، وَآمِنْ رَوْعَاتِي، اللَّهُمَّ احْفَظْنِي مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيَّ، وَمِنْ خَلْفِي، وَعَنْ يَمِينِي، وَعَنْ شِمَالِي، وَمِنْ فَوْقِي، وَأَعُوذُ بِعَظَمَتِكَ أَنْ أُغْتَالَ مِنْ تَحْتِي
athkar.items.seekingWellbeing:
O Allah, grant my body health, O Allah, grant my hearing health, O Allah, grant my sight health. None has the right to be worshipped except You. O Allah, I take refuge with You from disbelief and poverty, and I take refuge with You from the punishment of the grave. None has the right to be worshipped except You.
اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَدَنِي، اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي سَمْعِي، اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَصَرِي، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكُفْرِ، وَالْفَقْرِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
athkar.items.subhanAllahExtended:
How perfect Allah is and I praise Him by the number of His creation and His pleasure, and by the weight of His throne, and the ink of His words.
سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ: عَدَدَ خَلْقِهِ، وَرِضَا نَفْسِهِ، وَزِنَةَ عَرْشِهِ، وَمِدَادَ كَلِمَاتِهِ
athkar.items.subhanAllahWaBihamdihi:
How perfect Allah is and I praise Him.
سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ
athkar.items.surahAlFalaq: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ ﴿١﴾ مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ ﴿٢﴾ وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ ﴿٣﴾ وَمِن شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ ﴿٤﴾ وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ ﴿٥﴾
athkar.items.surahAlIkhlas: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ ﴿١﴾ اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ ﴿٢﴾ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ ﴿٣﴾ وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ ﴿٤﴾
athkar.items.surahAnNas: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ ﴿١﴾ مَلِكِ النَّاسِ ﴿٢﴾ إِلَٰهِ النَّاسِ ﴿٣﴾ مِن شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ ﴿٤﴾ الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ ﴿٥﴾ مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ ﴿٦﴾
athkar.items.yaHayyuYaQayyum:
O Ever Living, O Self-Subsisting and Supporter of all, by Your mercy I seek assistance, rectify for me all of my affairs and do not leave me to myself, even for the blink of an eye.
يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ بِرَحْمَتِكَ أَسْتَغِيثُ أَصْلِحْ لِي شَأْنِي كُلَّهُ وَلَا تَكِلْنِي إِلَى نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ

quran.guide.sajda.about.body: Apabila ayat sajdah dibaca atau didengari, satu sujud (sujud tilawah) disunatkan: ucapkan "Allahu akbar", sujud sekali, baca doa, kemudian bangun.
quran.guide.sajda.about.title: Sujud tilawah
quran.guide.sajda.dua_sajada_wajhi.body: Wajahku sujud kepada Yang menciptakannya dan membentuknya, serta membukakan pendengaran dan penglihatannya dengan kekuatan dan kekuasaan-Nya. Maha Berkat Allah, sebaik-baik pencipta.
quran.guide.sajda.dua_sajada_wajhi.title: Doa sujud
quran.guide.tajweed.ghunnah.body: Bunyi dengung yang ditahan kira-kira dua harakat pada huruf م atau ن yang bersabdu.
quran.guide.tajweed.ghunnah.title: Ghunnah
quran.guide.tajweed.idgham_ghunnah.body: Memasukkan nun sukun atau tanwin ke dalam huruf ي و ن م yang mengikutinya, dengan dengung.
quran.guide.tajweed.idgham_ghunnah.title: Idgham dengan ghunnah
quran.guide.tajweed.idgham_wo_ghunnah.bo: Memasukkan nun sukun atau tanwin ke dalam huruf ل atau ر, tanpa dengung.
quran.guide.tajweed.ikhafa.body: Menyebut nun sukun atau tanwin antara jelas dan dimasukkan, dengan sedikit dengung.
quran.guide.tajweed.ikhafa.title: Ikhfa
quran.guide.tajweed.iqlab.body: Menukar nun sukun atau tanwin kepada م yang tersembunyi sebelum huruf ب.
quran.guide.tajweed.iqlab.title: Iqlab
quran.guide.tajweed.madda_necessary.body: Bacaan panjang wajib selama enam harakat.
quran.guide.tajweed.madda_normal.title: Mad asli
quran.guide.tajweed.madda_permissible.bo: Dipanjangkan dua, empat, atau enam harakat.
quran.guide.tajweed.qalqalah.body: Sedikit pantulan bunyi pada huruf ق ط ب ج د apabila ia bersukun.
quran.guide.tajweed.qalqalah.title: Qalqalah
quran.guide.tajweed.silent.body: Huruf yang ditulis tetapi tidak disebut.
quran.guide.tajweed.silent.title: Huruf tidak disebut
quran.guide.tajweed.tafkhim.body: Bunyi tebal dan penuh — huruf-huruf isti'la, huruf ra tebal, dan lam pada nama Allah.
quran.guide.tajweed.tafkhim.title: Bacaan tebal
quran.guide.waqf.jaiz.body: Anda boleh berhenti atau teruskan di sini — kedua-duanya dibenarkan.
quran.guide.waqf.jaiz.title: Waqaf harus
quran.guide.waqf.la.body: Jangan berhenti di sini — meneruskan bacaan mengekalkan maknanya.
quran.guide.waqf.la.title: Jangan berhenti
quran.guide.waqf.lazim.body: Berhenti di sini. Meneruskan tanpa berhenti boleh menyimpangkan makna.
quran.guide.waqf.lazim.title: Waqaf wajib
quran.guide.waqf.waqf_awla.body: Anda boleh teruskan, tetapi berhenti di sini lebih baik.
quran.guide.waqf.waqf_awla.title: Lebih baik berhenti
quran.guide.waqf.wasl_awla.body: Anda boleh berhenti, tetapi meneruskan di sini lebih baik.
quran.guide.waqf.wasl_awla.title: Lebih baik teruskan

settings.widgets.batteryOptDesc: Membenarkan widget dikemas kini dengan pasti di latar belakang. Ketik untuk melumpuhkan pengoptimuman bateri untuk Nedaa.
settings.widgets.batteryOptDone: Pengoptimuman bateri dilumpuhkan — widget akan dikemas kini dengan pasti
settings.widgets.description: Tambah widget ke skrin utama untuk akses pantas ke waktu solat, kemajuan azkar, dan penjejakan qada.
settings.widgets.iosNote: Di iOS, tambah widget dengan menekan lama skrin utama dan ketik butang +.
settings.widgets.notSupported: Penambahan widget tidak disokong pada peranti ini
settings.widgets.prayerMediumDesc: Semua waktu solat dalam satu baris

umrah.checklist.tawaf.prayer: Solat 2 rakaat di Maqam Ibrahim. Disunatkan membaca surah (Al-Kafirun) pada rakaat pertama dan (Al-Ikhlas) pada rakaat kedua
umrah.complete.title: Umrah Selesai
umrah.duaNote: Anda juga boleh berdoa dengan apa sahaja yang anda mahu
umrah.endUmrah.message: Ini akan memadamkan kemajuan semasa anda. Anda boleh memulakan umrah baharu pada bila-bila masa.
umrah.endUmrah.title: Tamatkan Umrah?
umrah.featureCard.description: Panduan langkah demi langkah dengan doa sahih dari Sunnah
umrah.featureCard.title: Baharu: Panduan Umrah
umrah.history.title: Umrah Terdahulu
umrah.prepare.checklist.title: Senarai Semak Sebelum Umrah
umrah.prepare.ihram.ghuslDesc: Sunat mandi dan memakai wangian pada badan (bukan pada pakaian) sebelum ihram
umrah.prepare.ihram.ishtiraatDesc: Pilihan: Jika ada sesuatu yang menghalangiku maka tempat aku bertahallul adalah di mana Engkau menahanku
umrah.prepare.ihram.menIzar: Izar: Kain putih yang dililitkan pada bahagian bawah badan
umrah.prepare.ihram.menRida: Rida': Kain putih yang menutupi bahagian atas badan
umrah.prepare.ihram.menRules: Tidak boleh memakai pakaian berjahit dan tidak boleh menutup kepala. Selipar hendaklah mendedahkan buku lali
umrah.prepare.ihram.womenClothing: Pakaian longgar dan luas dalam apa-apa warna
umrah.prepare.ihram.womenHands: Tangan hendaklah terbuka — tidak boleh memakai sarung tangan semasa ihram
umrah.prepare.ihram.womenHijab: Hijab: Menutup rambut, wajah hendaklah terbuka
umrah.prepare.ihram.womenRules: Tidak boleh memakai niqab atau sarung tangan. Boleh melabuhkan kain longgar ke atas wajah di hadapan ajnabi
umrah.prepare.miqat.insideResult: Pergi ke Masjid Aisyah (Tan'im) untuk berihram
umrah.prepare.prohibitions.fidyah: Pelanggaran tidak sengaja tidak dikenakan penalti. Pelanggaran sengaja memerlukan Fidyah (kaffarah)
umrah.prepare.source: Sumber: Panduan Rasmi Kementerian Haji dan Umrah
umrah.prepare.title: Persediaan Umrah
umrah.resumeBanner.a11yHint: Ketik dua kali untuk meneruskan umrah anda
umrah.sources.commonSupplication: Doa umum — bukan daripada hadis tertentu

umrah.steps.ihram.talbiyah.description: Ucapkan Talbiah dari Miqat. Jemaah lelaki meninggikan suara, jemaah wanita merendahkan suara. Bagi jemaah umrah: setelah melihat Baitullah
